questions.question: Describe the five generic framework activities in software engineering with examples.
expectedPoints: Planning - create schedule, identify risks, allocate resources
Modeling - create analysis and design models
Construction - write code and perform testing
Deployment - deliver product, gather feedback, provide support

questions.question: Explain the five levels of CMMI and what characterizes each level.
expectedPoints: Level 1 Initial - ad hoc, unpredictable processes
Level 2 Managed - basic project management in place
Level 4 Quantitatively Managed - statistical process control
